violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage area and front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2026

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food items were moved onto shelving in each unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
